## Scope

Type: `probe | canon | policy | maintenance`

## Pins

- Preregistration commit:

## Checks

- [ ] Scope and status are exact.
- [ ] Formal execution followed the public pin.
- [ ] Fired falsifiers are recorded.
- [ ] Security review passed.
- [ ] Required `check` passed.
